title: Silent error swallowing in retry logic
author: contributor
pr_description: Adds retry logic to external API client.
diff:
--- a/api_client.py
+++ b/api_client.py
@@ -4,10 +4,16 @@ import requests
 
 def fetch_data(url, retries=3):
+    for attempt in range(retries):
+        try:
+            return requests.get(url).json()
+        except:
+            pass
+    return None

gold_issues.description: Bare except swallows all exceptions including KeyboardInterrupt. Errors are never logged.
Silent None return after all retries causes NoneType errors in callers with no indication of failure.
